bonuses.name: Scoot to Loot
bonuses.description: Sliding collects nearby ammo and temporarily grants enhanced reload speed and handling to your weapons.

bonuses.name: Shoot to Scoot
bonuses.description: Dealing damage with your weapons temporarily grants enhanced sliding. Sliding provides damage resistance.

bonuses.name: Rasputin's Wrath
bonuses.description: Final blows with area-of-effect damage, Solar abilities, Seventh Seraph weapons, or IKELOS weapons grant Warmind Charges. Each stack of Warmind Charge increases your Weapons and Grenade stats.

bonuses.name: Rasputin's Reprisal
bonuses.description:
While you have Warmind Charges, defeating powerful combatants, destroying a construct, or destroying a Tangle releases a Solar detonation that damages combatants and heals allies.

Constructs include barricades, turrets, Stasis crystals, and other objects created in the field.

bonuses.name: Wrecker
bonuses.description: You deal significantly increased Kinetic damage to combatant shields, overshields, vehicles, and constructs. Constructs include barricades, turrets, Stasis crystals, and other objects created in the field.

bonuses.name: Concussive Rounds
bonuses.description: Defeating powerful combatants or breaking a combatant shield with Kinetic damage releases a disorienting Kinetic shockwave.

bonuses.name: Iron Sharpens Iron
bonuses.description: Final blows on Guardians and powerful combatants generate additional ammo progress.

bonuses.name: Ascendant Escape
bonuses.description: After a final blow on a powerful combatant, the next time your shields are broken, you become invisible.

bonuses.name: Vigilant Watch
bonuses.description: As your health gets lower, your weapons gain increased stability and handling. Weapon final blows while your shields are depleted heal you.

bonuses.name: Iron Conviction
bonuses.description: When your shields become broken, you gain increased ammo generation, flinch resistance, and damage resistance against nearby combatants for a short time. Final blows extend this effect.

bonuses.name: Resonant Plating
bonuses.description: Your health begins regenerating immediately after taking melee damage from a powerful combatant.

bonuses.name: Siphoning Touch
bonuses.description: Gain stacks of Siphoning Touch for weapon or Glaive melee hits. Switching weapons heals you and consumes all stacks.

bonuses.name: A Wish for Protection
bonuses.description: Taking significant damage in a short time generates a Protective Wish that makes it harder for combatants to hit you, and grants increased reload speed and flinch resistance.

bonuses.name: A Wish Fulfilled
bonuses.description:
When the Protective Wish expires, it cures you. 

Rapid final blows prematurely end the Protective Wish.

bonuses.name: Ionic Overclock
bonuses.description: While amplified, your Fusion Rifles, Linear Fusion Rifles, and Heat weapons gain increased handling, reload, and vent speeds.

bonuses.name: Shock and Clear
bonuses.description: Final blows with Jolt or against jolted combatants create Ionic Traces.

bonuses.name: Network Admin
bonuses.description:
Being near allies creates a relay network that gives the wearer improved handling and reload speed. 

Being near other allied Network Admins additionally grants the wearer a bonus to Health stat.

bonuses.name: Network Upload
bonuses.description: Weapon final blows grant the wearer and nearby allies melee energy.

bonuses.name: Taken Barrier
bonuses.description: Grenade final blows temporarily reduce incoming damage.

bonuses.name: Taken Armaments
bonuses.description: Grenade final blows grant additional Heavy ammo progress.

bonuses.name: Radiolaria Breach
bonuses.description: After picking up an Orb of Power, the next time your shields are broken, gain a bonus to Health stat for a short duration and release a burst of radiolaria around you.

bonuses.name: Collective Power
bonuses.description: While you have a subclass buff, dealing sustained damage creates an Orb of Power.

bonuses.name: Primary Survivor
bonuses.description: When an ally is defeated, Primary ammo weapons gain increased handling, reload speed, target acquisition, and reduced flinch. Bonus increases when multiple allies are dead at the same time or when you are running solo.

bonuses.name: Primary Phantom
bonuses.description: Final blows with Primary ammo weapons remove you from radar for a short time. Drawing a weapon that does not use Primary ammo will immediately end this effect.

bonuses.name: Augmented Servos
bonuses.description: Powered melees release an additional disorienting pulse when used to defeat a target.

bonuses.name: God-like Judgment
bonuses.description: When your shields are broken by a combatant, or upon casting your Super, release a swarm of heat seeking micro-missiles.

bonuses.name: Force Absorption
bonuses.description: Final blows with a Rocket Launcher, Grenade Launcher, or micro-missile temporarily decrease incoming area-of-effect damage.

bonuses.name: Reactive Shock
bonuses.description: When Force Absorption is active, taking melee damage causes you to emit a disorienting burst once.

bonuses.name: Accretion
bonuses.description: Picking up an ammo brick gives you a stacking bonus to weapon swap and stow speeds until you die.

bonuses.name: Doppler Effect
bonuses.description: Suspend, unravel, and sever effects applied to targets, and radiant and restoration effects applied to you have increased duration.

bonuses.name: Iaido
bonuses.description: Final blows with freshly drawn or reloaded weapons heal you.

bonuses.name: Unfaltering Focus
bonuses.description: Bow, Shotgun, or Sword final blows temporarily reduce incoming damage. Damaging targets with those weapons extends the effect.

bonuses.name: Force Converter
bonuses.description: After a final blow with a Rocket Launcher, Grenade Launcher, or micro-missile, sprint for a short time to gain Speed Booster.

bonuses.name: Reactive Booster
bonuses.description: Once per activation of Force Converter, sprinting while at critical health, being suspended, or being slowed by a Stasis effect will immediately grant Speed Booster for a short duration.

bonuses.name: Queensfoil Rush
bonuses.description: Gain a powerful overshield while performing your finisher. When you finish a target, release a slowing burst around you.

bonuses.name: Truth to Power
bonuses.description: Gain increasing damage resistance when you deal damage or land final blows. Finishers grant accelerated progress. At max stacks, the recharge rate of your abilities is also increased.

bonuses.name: Regenerative Threshold
bonuses.description: Performing a finisher stores power. The next time your shields are broken, consume stored power to immediately heal and start health regeneration.

bonuses.name: Melee Conduction
bonuses.description: While you have Radiant, Restoration, or Cure, your melee hits release a burst that will scorch the target.

bonuses.name: Between Poles
bonuses.description: Final blows with Light weapons grants stacks of Light Polarity, which grants Grenade stat. Final blows with Darkness or Kinetic weapons grants stacks of Dark Polarity, which grants stacks of Melee stat.

bonuses.name: So Very Thin
bonuses.description: Final blows with Light weapons grants additional grenade energy. Final blows with Dark or Kinetic weapons grants additional melee energy. Rapid final blows that alternate between Light and Darkness grant a short period of damage resistance.

bonuses.name: Untold Greed
bonuses.description: Picking up ammo, Orbs of Power, Elemental pickups, or destroying a Strand Tangle grants stacks of Untold Greed, slightly reducing damage taken and providing reload speed to equipped weapons. When your shields are broken, some stacks are lost.

bonuses.name: Overflowing Coffers
bonuses.description: While you have stacks of Untold Greed, Orbs of Power and Elemental pickups provide more of their respective energy, and Strand Tangles deal increased damage. When your shields are broken, all stacks are converted into a fountain of Orbs of Power.

bonuses.name: Old Martian Diplomacy
bonuses.description: Stowing a weapon after defeating a powerful combatant or a Guardian heals you a small amount and disorients nearby combatants.

bonuses.name: High Noon
bonuses.description: Freshly drawn weapons deal increased precision damage to combatants for a short period. Weapons with the Tex Balanced Stock Origin Trait equipped or Exotics manufactured by the Tex Mechanica Foundry gain further increased benefits.

bonuses.name: Built Bitter
bonuses.description: Taking damage increases the reload speed of your equipped weapon until it is stowed. Taking more damage increases the effect.

bonuses.name: Bittersweet
bonuses.description: When you stow a weapon, restore health based on the number of Built Bitter stacks lost.

bonuses.name: The Ceremony
bonuses.description: Finishing combatants or reviving allies initiates a Lucent Hive ritual. While the ritual is active, gain increased Super stat.

bonuses.name: Lucent Swarm
bonuses.description: Collecting Orbs of Power extends the Ceremony. While it is active, ability final blows occasionally spawn allied Arc moths.

bonuses.name: Stack 'Em Up
bonuses.description: Defeating targets with unique elemental damage grants a stacking bonus to Transcendence energy gains while Transcendence is inactive.

bonuses.name: Burn 'Em Down
bonuses.description: While Transcendence is active, using your grenade ability consumes all stacks of Stack 'Em Up to grant an escalating amount of grenade energy.

bonuses.name: Taking Initiative
bonuses.description: Hitting combatants with melee attacks or Sword strikes grants a stack of Initiative, giving bonus handling and reload. Stacks decay slowly over time.

bonuses.name: Healing Initiative
bonuses.description: While you have Initiative, using your class ability creates a stationary healing aura. The aura gains increased healing based on the number of Initiative stacks.

bonuses.name: Primary Honing
bonuses.description: Increases handling and reload speed for Primary ammo weapons. Primary ammo weapons gain increased damage against non-boss combatants based on your Weapons stat.

bonuses.name: Supercyclical
bonuses.description: Final blows while your Super is active refund Super energy when it ends.

bonuses.name: Adrenal Rush
bonuses.description: Sprinting for a short time grants a period of improved reload speed and handling. Final blows extend this period.

bonuses.name: Bountiful Munitions
bonuses.description: While Adrenal Rush is active, final blows grant Special Ammo progress. Final Blows against powerful combatants, Guardians, and Taken grants additional progress.

bonuses.name: Revving Up
bonuses.description: Fast movement builds up a charge that gradually increases your health regeneration speed. Once you are Fully Revved, sprinting grants Speed Booster.

bonuses.name: Dielectric Drift
bonuses.description: Sliding while Speed Booster is active jolts combatants in front of you.

bonuses.name: Paroli
bonuses.description: Primary ammo weapons gain a bonus to flinch resistance after sliding.

bonuses.name: Martingale
bonuses.description: Your weapons gain a temporary increase to handling and aim-down-sights speed when an ally is defeated or you revive an ally.

bonuses.name: Opening Act
bonuses.description: Final blows with grenades grant Heat weapons bonus stability and vent speed and grant Primary ammo weapons bonus stability and reload speed.

bonuses.name: Room Clearing
bonuses.description: Multiple final blows with Heat weapons or Primary ammo weapons grant bonuses to weapon and grenade stats and increased ammo generation for Heat weapons and Primary ammo weapons.

bonuses.name: Nightmarish Power
bonuses.description: Final blows to a challenging combatant or higher-ranked target grant Unstable Essence. When you have Unstable Essence, you receive grenade and melee stat bonuses.

bonuses.name: Nightmarish Resilience
bonuses.description: When you have Unstable Essence, rapid weapon damage or final blows heal you and begin health regeneration.

bonuses.name: Fanfare
bonuses.description: Gain increased reload speed for the bottom half of your equipped weapon's magazine.

bonuses.name: Suros Harmony
bonuses.description: Reloading a weapon grants it a bonus to handling and reduces incoming flinch for a short time. Weapons with the SUROS Synergy Origin Trait are granted increased range instead.

bonuses.name: Well Prepared
bonuses.description: Picking up ammo grants Armor Charge. Grants a bonus to Health stat per Armor Charge you have.

bonuses.name: Down the Line
bonuses.description: Sustained damage on minibosses, Champions, and bosses increases weapon damage versus base and powerful combatants. Weapon final blows consume one stack each.

bonuses.name: Balestra
bonuses.description:
Damaging a target with a Sword, Glaive, or any melee attack exhausts them. 

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

bonuses.name: Stesso Tempo
bonuses.description: Blocking attacks with a Sword or Glaive grants a short period of damage resistance against targets when you next drop your guard.

bonuses.name: Special Relativity
bonuses.description: Picking up ammo reloads stowed Special weapons from reserves.

bonuses.name: Superluminal Motion
bonuses.description: After dealing damage with your Super, health and shields regenerate over time while you are in motion. Additional Super damage refreshes this effect.

bonuses.name: Gift of the Ley Lines
bonuses.description: Rapidly defeating combatants with Void energy spawns a Void breach.

bonuses.name: Techeun's Foresight
bonuses.description: After collecting a Void breach, your next final blow with a Void weapon triggers a detonation. The detonation is more powerful if it is triggered quickly after collecting a Void breach.

bonuses.name: Lucent Transmutation
bonuses.description: Performing a finisher on a combatant, or landing successive powered melee final blows, generates an Elemental pickup based on your Light subclass.

bonuses.name: Lucent Tithes
bonuses.description: Performing a finisher on powerful combatants heals you and generates loyal Void moths.

bonuses.name: Watchtower
bonuses.description: Precision final blows while aiming down sights grant damage resistance until you stop aiming down sights.

bonuses.name: Field Expertise
bonuses.description:
Precision final blows with any weapon grant a stacking bonus to reload speed, target acquisition, and weapon damage against non-boss combatants for a short duration.

Weapon final blows with non-precision direct hits end this effect early.

bonuses.name: Bad Dreams
bonuses.description: Final blows versus subclass-debuffed targets have an escalating chance to spawn an Orb of Power.

bonuses.name: Dream-Devourer
bonuses.description: Performing a finisher versus a powerful combatant grants Devour. While you have Devour, gain damage resistance versus combatants.

bonuses.name: Primary Chain
bonuses.description: Primary ammo weapon final blows grant a stacking bonus to mobility and Primary weapon range and handling until you are defeated.

bonuses.name: Sublime Transit
bonuses.description: Increases mobility and grants enhanced sprint speed and slide distance.

bonuses.name: Cursed Fist
bonuses.description: Melee final blows trigger a Cursed Thrall explosion.

bonuses.name: Power of the Son
bonuses.description: Being in combat for a duration grants progressively more flinch resistance and damage resistance versus combatants.

bonuses.name: Stable Resonance
bonuses.description: Defeating a powerful combatant generates Stable Resonance, which grants damage resistance and increased weapon damage for the duration.

bonuses.name: Resonance Redirection
bonuses.description: While you have Stable Resonance, continued weapon damage occasionally generates a resonance burst that damages and exhausts targets.

bonuses.name: Ride Together, Die Together
bonuses.description: When you pick up an Orb of Power, gain a brief period of rapidly decaying damage reduction.

bonuses.name: Too Old for This
bonuses.description: Defeating a powerful combatant with a finisher grants you Special ammo progress and replenishes a small amount of health.

bonuses.name: Reflex Action
bonuses.description: Swapping to a Heat weapon, Submachine Gun, or Hand Cannon grants a short period of increased handling and accuracy. This effect is extended by dealing damage with that weapon.

bonuses.name: Hotshot
bonuses.description: Dealing final blows while Reflex Action is active grants a bonus to weapon stat and increases stability, reload, and aim assist for Heat weapons, Submachine Guns, and Hand Cannons for a moderate duration.

bonuses.name: Pleas Heard
bonuses.description: Reloading an Auto Rifle, Scout Rifle, or Sidearm after a final blow slowly restores health until you reenter combat.

bonuses.name: Magnificent Duty
bonuses.description: When you reach critical health or heal an ally at critical health, Auto Rifles, Scout Rifles, and Sidearms gain a period of increased range, stability, and reload speed.

bonuses.name: Resupply
bonuses.description: After being out of combat for a moderate duration, your next final blow grants additional ammo progress and creates an Orb of Power.

bonuses.name: From the Storm
bonuses.description: After being out of combat for a moderate duration, slowly gain Frost Armor until you reenter combat.

bonuses.name: Emergency Electromagnet
bonuses.description: When your shields become broken, collect all nearby Orbs of Power and ammo bricks.

bonuses.name: Repurposed Charge
bonuses.description:
Whenever you gain, lose, or spend an Armor Charge, heal and gain damage reduction for a short time.

This effect scales with the amount of Armor Charge gained, lost, or spent.

bonuses.name: Terminal Velocity
bonuses.description: Final blows with primary ammo weapons grant your primary ammo weapons temporarily increased reload speed.

bonuses.name: Power Loader
bonuses.description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants Special ammo progress.

bonuses.name: Crook and Flail
bonuses.description: Picking up an ammo brick heals you.

bonuses.name: Gift of Sight
bonuses.description: Final blows with Primary ammo weapons grant you briefly increased radar resolution.

bonuses.name: License to Thrill
bonuses.description: Activating your grenade or the Nanotech Tracer Missiles Origin Trait provides stacking resistance to incoming damage at point-blank range.

bonuses.name: Lethal Weave
bonuses.description: Defeating an unraveled combatant grants grenade ability energy. If you have max grenade energy, you are granted Special ammo meter progress instead.

bonuses.name: Augmented Armaments
bonuses.description: Primary ammo weapons deal increased damage to disoriented combatants.

bonuses.name: Augmented Explosives
bonuses.description: Your grenade abilities release an additional disorienting pulse shortly after detonating.

bonuses.name: Sinew Stitching
bonuses.description: Taking damage from combatants sometimes spawns a Threadling.

bonuses.name: Knit Together
bonuses.description: For a short time after your shields break, your next several Threadling hits restore health.

bonuses.name: Rapid Repair
bonuses.description: When your shields begin to regenerate, you gain flinch resistance and damage resistance for a short time.

bonuses.name: Built from Scratch
bonuses.description: While your reserves are low, combatant final blows with weapons provide additional ammo progress based on their ammo type.  Primary ammo weapons boost Special ammo progress, and Special ammo weapons boost Heavy ammo progress.

bonuses.name: Photogalvanic
bonuses.description: Receiving healing temporarily grants your Solar weapons increased flinch resistance, handling, and reload speed.

bonuses.name: Cauterize
bonuses.description: Rapid Solar final blows heal you.

bonuses.name: Combat Meditation
bonuses.description: Sword hits return grenade and class energy. Bonus energy is granted if Blade Focus is active.

bonuses.name: Blade Focus
bonuses.description: Briefly guard with a Sword to ready Blade Focus. While Blade Focus is readied, hitting a target with your sword increases Sword damage and lunge distance for a moderate duration.
